name: cms-mcp
description: Universal MCP server for any REST-based CMS. Auto-generates 3 schema-driven tools per endpoint (list, get, mutate) from OpenAPI spec or live introspection. Optional plugins for human approval gates, policy enforcement, semantic search, and GitHub sync.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of your REST API (e.g. https://api.example.com/api)

token.description: Use env: prefix to read from environment

header.description: Custom header name for api-key auth

endpoints.description: Map of endpoint key → path. Each key gets list_X, get_X, mutate_X tools.

readOnly.description: Disable all write tools when true

discoveryUrl.description: Override URL for OpenAPI spec (JSON or YAML)

approvals.description: Human approval gate — requires browser click before writes execute

tools.description: Specific tools to gate. Omit to gate all writes.

policies.description: Path to cms-mcp.policies.json — 10 rule types for publishing standards

auditLog.description: Path for NDJSON audit log. Use ~/ for home directory.

tools.name: list_X
tools.description: List records for endpoint X. Supports limit (default 20), full-text search, and enum field filters auto-generated from your schema. Replace X with your endpoint key (e.g. list_posts, list_products).

tools.name: get_X
tools.description: Fetch a single record by ID from endpoint X. Returns the full JSON record.

tools.name: mutate_X
tools.description: Create, update, delete, or preview changes to a record in endpoint X. The action param selects the operation: preview (no write), create (POST), update (PATCH), delete (DELETE).

action.description: preview = show diff without writing; create/update/delete require confirm: true

id.description: Record ID — required for update, delete, and preview-update

data.description: Fields to write. Schema-driven — only fields from your API accepted.

tools.name: discover_api
tools.description: Probe your API for an OpenAPI/Swagger spec. Returns discovered resources, endpoint paths, and a suggested endpoints config block.

tools.name: apply_discovered_endpoints
tools.description: Write the discovered endpoint config to cms-mcp.config.json and prompt a restart.

tools.name: inspect_endpoint_schema
tools.description: Show the full schema for a configured endpoint — field names, types, required/optional status. Sources: OpenAPI spec (authoritative) or live sampling.

tools.name: refresh_resource_schema
tools.description: Invalidate the SQLite cache for one endpoint and re-introspect: cache → OpenAPI → sampling → cold-start. Prompts server restart to apply new tool shapes.

tools.name: list_configured_endpoints
tools.description: Show a table of all configured endpoints with URL, schema source (cache/OpenAPI/sampled/cold-start), and field count.

tools.name: cache_stats
tools.description: Show SQLite schema cache statistics: hit rate, entry count, TTL, size on disk.

tools.name: clear_cache
tools.description: Clear the SQLite schema cache for one or all endpoints.

endpoint.description: Specific endpoint key, or omit to clear all

tools.name: upload_media_from_url
tools.description: Download a remote image/file and upload it to your CMS media endpoint. SSRF-hardened: blocks private IPs, AWS metadata, IPv6 ULA. 50 MB cap.

tools.name: list_media
tools.description: List media files from your CMS media endpoint.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: [Plugin: schemaCache required] Search across all synced content using TF-IDF or OpenAI embeddings. Returns top matches with similarity scores.

tools.name: sync_all_content
tools.description: [Plugin: schemaCache required] Fetch all records from every configured endpoint and index them in the vector cache for semantic search.

tools.name: scan_repo
tools.description: [Plugin: github required] Scan a GitHub repository — README, package.json, languages — and extract tech stack, description, and metadata.

tools.name: sync_repo_to_project
tools.description: [Plugin: github required] Scan a GitHub repo and create or update a project record in your CMS with the extracted metadata.

tools.name: check_policies
tools.description: [Plugin: policies required] Run all configured policy rules against proposed content. Returns violations with field-level detail.

tools.name: init_policies
tools.description: [Plugin: policies required] Generate a starter cms-mcp.policies.json for your endpoints with sensible defaults.

prompts.name: cms-audit
prompts.description: Audit all content in a configured endpoint for quality issues — missing SEO fields, draft posts, broken URLs.

prompts.name: cms-publish-workflow
prompts.description: Run the full publish workflow for a draft record: fetch, review, fill SEO fields, show diff, and publish with approval.

prompts.name: cms-bulk-update
prompts.description: Apply a field update to all records in an endpoint matching a filter.

prompts.name: cms-schema-report
prompts.description: Generate a full schema report for all configured endpoints — field types, required fields, relation hints.

prompts.name: cms-github-sync
prompts.description: Scan all public repos for a GitHub user and sync them as project records.

arguments.name: endpointKey
arguments.description: CMS endpoint to sync into (default: projects)

resources.name: CMS collection
resources.description: List all records for a configured endpoint. HTML content is distilled to Markdown.

resources.name: CMS record
resources.description: Single record from a configured endpoint, with HTML fields distilled to Markdown.
